title: Add Text To Image to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Telegram, meet pixels
gist.blurb: A brand new Telegram bot just landed in the community greenhouse! Now you can turn your text prompts into stunning images right from your chats.
gist.summary: Added a new community-built Telegram bot to the app showcase that generates images from text prompts using the Pollinations API.
gist.impact: Users can now easily generate AI images directly within Telegram using this new community integration.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee in a cozy greenhouse, holding a blue paper airplane (Telegram logo metaphor) while a retro smartphone nearby displays a glowing image. Represents the new Telegram text-to-image bot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny postman hat, holding a small blue paper airplane next to a retro smartphone that is printing out a colorful pixel landscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
